'''Radiation grenades''' were small [[Grenade/Legends|explosives]] that were either thrown or launched from a [[Grenade launcher/Legends|grenade launcher]]. On impact, a radiation grenade detonated in a burst of light smoke, releasing a cloud of short-lived [[Radiation/Legends|radioactive]] particles that immediately sickened and weakened targets.<ref name="Galaxy at War" /> The radiation grenade had a 3-[[Meter/Legends|meter]] blast radius and bypassed most conventional armors and shields; because of this they were considered highly illegal and were used by only the most depraved or desperate armies.<ref name="Galaxy at War" /><ref name="SAGA">''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Saga Edition Core Rulebook]]''</ref> Radiation sickness would persist and progressively worsen until it was cured.<ref name="SAGA" />

The grenade was used by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] against the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] and their [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] leaders.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Battlefront]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]''
